have h₄ : a * 40 = Nat.gcd a 40 * Nat.lcm a 40 := by apply Nat.gcd_mul_lcm
  rw [h₁, h₂] at h₄
  have h₅ : x + 3 ∣ 40 := Nat.gcd_dvd_right a 40 ▸ by simpa [h₁] using Nat.dvd_refl (Nat.gcd a 40)
  have h₆ : x + 3 ∣ x * (x + 3) := dvd_mul_right x (x + 3)
  have h₇ : x + 3 ∣ 40 * x := by
    calc
      x + 3 ∣ Nat.gcd a 40 * Nat.lcm a 40 := by simpa [h₁, h₂] using Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left h₅ (x * (x + 3))
      _ = a * 40 := by rw [← h₄]
      _ ∣ 40 * x := by
        use a
        linarith
  have h₈ : x + 3 ∣ 40 * x - 40 * (x + 3) := Nat.dvd_sub' h₇ (by simpa using dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (Nat.dvd_refl 40) (x + 3))
  simp at h₈
  have h₉ : x + 3 ∣ 120 := by
    calc
      x + 3 ∣ 40 * (x + 3) - 40 * x := by simpa using Nat.dvd_sub' (dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (Nat.dvd_refl 40) (x + 3)) h₇
      _ = 120 := by ring
  have h₁₀ : x + 3 ≤ 120 := Nat.le_of_dvd (by linarith) h₉
  have h₁₁ : x + 3 ∈ ({1, 2, 4, 5, 8, 10, 20, 40} : Finset ℕ) := by
    have h₁₂ : x + 3 ∣ 40 := h₅
    exact Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨by linarith, h₁₂⟩, by decide⟩
  have h₁₃ : x + 3 = 8 := by
    revert h₁₁
    decide
  have h₁₄ : x = 5 := by omega
  have h₁₅ : a = 8 := by
    have h₁₆ : Nat.gcd a 40 = 8 := by rw [h₁, h₁₃]
    have h₁₇ : Nat.lcm a 40 = 40 := by rw [h₂, h₁₄, h₁₃]; norm_num
    have h₁₈ : a * 40 = 8 * 40 := by rw [← h₄, h₁₆, h₁₇]
    have h₁₉ : a = 8 := by
      apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_right (by norm_num : 0 < 40)
      linarith
    exact h₁₉
  exact h₁₅

  have h₆ : x + 3 ∣ a := Nat.gcd_dvd_left a 40 ▸ by simp [h₁]
  have h₇ : x + 3 > 0 := by linarith
  have h₈ : x + 3 ≤ 40 := Nat.le_of_dvd (by linarith) h₅
  have h₉ : x ≤ 37 := by linarith
  interval_cases x <;> simp_all
  <;> try { omega }

have h₄ : a * 40 = Nat.gcd a 40 * Nat.lcm a 40 := by rw [Nat.gcd_mul_lcm]
  rw [h₁, h₂] at h₄
  have h₅ : x + 3 ∣ 40 := Nat.gcd_dvd_right a 40 ▸ by simp [h₁]
  have h₆ : x + 3 ∣ a := Nat.gcd_dvd_left a 40 ▸ by simp [h₁]
  have h₇ : x + 3 > 0 := by linarith
  have h₈ : x + 3 ≤ 40 := Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) h₅
  have h₉ : x ≤ 37 := by linarith
  interval_cases x <;> simp_all
  <;> try { omega }
